# 508.dev Extended Context

## Summary

508.dev is an engineering co-op that connects companies with vetted offshore developers. The firm highlights strong engineering standards, transparent pricing logic, and a co-op ownership model in which engineers are members rather than a conventional agency talent pool.

## Positioning

- AI-native engineering co-op
- Offshore development without typical agency margin structure
- Senior engineering judgment remains responsible for architecture, review, and production outcomes
- Suitable for companies seeking frontend, backend, AI/ML, data science, or blockchain expertise

## What 508.dev Says It Optimizes For

- Better engineering quality relative to bill rate
- Engineers who are already current on modern AI coding tools and workflows
- Fast iteration with accountable human review
- Transferable, maintainable code rather than short-term output
- Distributed-team discipline and project organization

## Primary Public Pages

- Home: https://508.dev/
- Pricing: https://508.dev/pricing
- Portfolio: https://508.dev/portfolio
- Members: https://508.dev/members
- Join: https://508.dev/join

## Services and Capabilities

- Frontend engineering
- Backend engineering
- AI / ML engineering
- Data science
- Blockchain development

## Engagement Signals

- 508.dev presents itself as a co-op rather than a conventional offshore agency
- Pricing content emphasizes lower structural overhead and closer alignment between bill rate and engineer compensation
- Portfolio content should be used for project examples and proof points
- The members page is the public talent directory

## Contact

- Website: https://508.dev/
- Email: hello@508.dev
- Meeting link: https://cal.com/calebjay/30m

## Retrieval Guidance For AI Agents

- Prefer pricing, portfolio, and join pages for stable company information
- Use the members page for public profile discovery and skill browsing
- If the member directory is unavailable, rely on the rest of the site for company-level facts
